message:
perf: remove runtime base-offset checks from pointer compression

Since the low-address arena guarantees all pointers are within 44-bit
range (base=0), the runtime getCompressedHeapBase() load + compare +
branch in compressPtr/decompressPtr/toJSValue is dead code. Remove it
entirely — compress is now a single AND, decompress is a single mask.
initCompressedHeap() still panics if base != 0 as a safety check.
